intitule: Vocabulary Check: Periods of the Day

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Match the words on the left with their correct definitions on the right. Write the letter of the definition next to the word.

  • 1. Morning → ...
  • 2. Afternoon → ...
  • 3. Evening → ...
  • 4. Night → ...
  • 5. Sunrise → ...
  • 6. Sunset → ...

Definitions:

  • A. The time when the sun goes down in the evening.
  • B. The time when the sun comes up in the morning.
  • C. The early part of the day, from sunrise to noon.
  • D. The part of the day from noon to evening.
  • E. The period between sunset and sunrise when it is dark.
  • F. The last part of the day, from late afternoon to night.

questions.texte: Match each word to its correct definition.

intitule: Fill in the Blanks: Daily Routines

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct word from the box below.

Word Box: morning, afternoon, evening, night, sunrise, sunset

  1. I wake up at _______ every day.
  2. We have lunch in the _______.
  3. My family watches TV in the _______.
  4. I go to bed at _______.
  5. The sky is beautiful at _______.
  6. We see the sun come up at _______.

questions.texte: Fill in each blank with the appropriate word from the box.
questions.reponse: 1. sunrise, 2. afternoon, 3. evening, 4. night, 5. sunset, 6. sunrise

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Read each sentence and identify the period of the day (morning, afternoon, evening, night).

  1. I brush my teeth at 7:00 AM. → ______
  2. We eat dinner at 7:00 PM. → ______
  3. She goes to school at 8:00 AM. → ______
  4. They watch the stars at 9:00 PM. → ______
  5. We play football at 4:00 PM. → ______
  6. I do my homework at 6:00 PM. → ______

questions.texte: Identify the period of the day for each activity.
questions.reponse: 1. morning, 2. evening, 3. morning, 4. night, 5. afternoon, 6. evening

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Read the text below and answer the questions that follow.

Text:

My name is Marie. I am a student in Class 6. Every day, I wake up at 6:00 AM in the morning. I brush my teeth and take a shower. At 7:00 AM, I have breakfast with my family. I go to school at 7:30 AM. In the afternoon, I eat lunch at 12:30 PM with my friends. I come back home at 3:30 PM. In the evening, I do my homework and watch TV. I have dinner at 7:00 PM with my parents. At night, I read a book and go to bed at 9:30 PM.

  1. What time does Marie wake up?
  2. When does Marie have breakfast?
  3. What does Marie do in the afternoon?
  4. What does Marie do in the evening?
  5. What time does Marie go to bed?

questions.texte: Answer the questions based on the text.
questions.reponse:
1. She wakes up at 6:00 AM.
2. She has breakfast at 7:00 AM.
3. She eats lunch and comes back home.
4. She does her homework and watches TV.
5. She goes to bed at 9:30 PM.

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Write a short paragraph (5-7 sentences) about your daily routine. Include the periods of the day: morning, afternoon, evening, night. Also mention what you do at each period.

Guidelines:

  • Start with your wake-up time.
  • Describe your activities in the morning, afternoon, evening, and night.
  • Use the vocabulary from the lesson.

questions.texte: Write a paragraph about your daily routine.
questions.reponse:
Sample answer:

I wake up at 6:00 AM in the morning. I brush my teeth and take a shower. I have breakfast at 7:00 AM and then go to school. In the afternoon, I eat lunch at 12:30 PM and play with my friends. I come back home at 3:30 PM. In the evening, I do my homework and help my mother. I have dinner at 7:00 PM. At night, I watch a little TV and then go to bed at 9:00 PM.

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Read each sentence and write True or False.

  1. We eat breakfast in the morning. ______
  2. We go to bed in the afternoon. ______
  3. The sun rises in the evening. ______
  4. We have lunch in the afternoon. ______
  5. We watch stars at night. ______
  6. The sun sets in the morning. ______

questions.texte: Write True or False for each statement.
questions.reponse: 1. True, 2. False, 3. False, 4. True, 5. True, 6. False

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Rearrange the words to make correct sentences about daily routines.

  1. I / morning / wake / in / up / the / at / 6:00.
  2. lunch / afternoon / we / the / in / eat.
  3. evening / homework / do / the / I / my / in.
  4. night / to / go / bed / at / I / 9:30.
  5. morning / breakfast / the / have / in / I.

questions.texte: Rearrange the words to form correct sentences.
questions.reponse:
1. I wake up at 6:00 in the morning.
2. We eat lunch in the afternoon.
3. I do my homework in the evening.
4. I go to bed at 9:30 at night.
5. I have breakfast in the morning.

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Create a daily schedule for yourself. Write down what you do at different times of the day. Use the periods: morning, afternoon, evening, night.

Example:

TimeActivity
6:00 AMWake up
7:00 AMHave breakfast

Your schedule should have at least 6 activities.

questions.texte: Create a daily schedule with at least 6 activities.
questions.reponse:
Sample answer:

TimeActivity
6:00 AMWake up
7:00 AMHave breakfast
8:00 AMGo to school
12:30 PMEat lunch
3:30 PMCome back home
7:00 PMHave dinner
9:00 PMGo to bed
